t.t: Submit products and follow their selection status

a.t-attf-class: otm-nav-link otm-secondary #{'otm-active' if page_name in ('otm_vendor_simple_bulk_upload', 'otm_vendor_simple_bulk_group') else ''}
a.title: Alternative upload method that works even without JavaScript

a.t-attf-class: otm-nav-link #{'otm-active' if page_name in nav_item[3] else ''}

div.class: otm-page-header d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3

div.p: Here's an overview of your product submissions.

div.div: Once you upload images in bulk, your batches will show up here.

div.class: otm-page-header d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3

div.p: Manage and track products submitted for purchase review.

div.div: Upload your first product to start submitting items for purchase review.

div.class: otm-page-header d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2

span.class: otm-dup-badge otm-dup-exact position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-1
otm-dup-badge otm-dup-possible position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-1
otm-dup-badge otm-dup-similar position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-1

div.label: Add Images
div.div: JPG, PNG or WEBP. You can select multiple photos at once.

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if submission and submission.primary_category_id.id == category.id else None
'selected' if submission and category.id in submission.category_ids.ids else None
'selected' if submission and submission.gender == opt[0] else None
'selected' if submission and submission.season == opt[0] else None

div.p: Fill in the details and add one or more photos below, then tap Save — the product and its images are created together in one step.

div.div: JPG, PNG or WEBP. Add photos now, or skip this and add them from the product page after saving.

div.p: Upload many images at once — no need to create a product first. Once uploaded, group the images below and give each group a name and price to turn it into a product. Duplicates are checked automatically. Maximum MB per image.

div.div: Tap to choose photos from your gallery or camera
Desktop: you can also drag & drop images here.
Total: • New: • Exact duplicates: • Possible duplicates:
Large batch queued — duplicate analysis continues in the background. Refresh this section shortly, or check Upload History.

div.p: Tap the images that belong to the same product, then tap "Create Product from Selected". Repeat until every image is assigned. Images flagged as duplicates are best reviewed before creating a product from them.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mt-3 sticky-bottom bg-white py-2

div.p: You can add sizes, brand and other details afterwards from My Products.
Works without JavaScript — pick your photos and tap Upload. Maximum MB per image.

div.div: Please choose at least one image before uploading.

div.label: Choose Photos
div.div: Your browser will not let you submit without selecting at least one file — no extra checks needed.

div.p: Tick the images that belong to one product, name it below, and tap Create Product. Repeat for the rest — nothing is lost if you leave images ungrouped for now.

div.div: Product created. Continue grouping the remaining images below, or leave the rest for later — they'll still be here.
Enter a product name and select at least one image.
Once you upload photos, they'll appear here for grouping into products.

div.p: A record of every bulk image upload you've made.

div.div: Bulk-upload some product photos and they'll show up here.

div.span: To update your profile details, please contact the purchase team.
